items.question: What are the main climate zones of Africa and how do they affect agriculture?
items.expected_answer: Africa has five main climate zones: equatorial (rainforest), tropical savanna, desert (Sahara, Kalahari), Mediterranean (north/south tips), and highland. These determine crop suitability, growing seasons, and farming methods across the continent.

items.question: How has mobile phone adoption transformed financial services in East Africa?
items.expected_answer: Mobile money services like M-Pesa in Kenya have enabled financial inclusion for millions of unbanked people. Services include money transfers, bill payments, savings, and microloans, all accessible via basic mobile phones.

rubric.criterion: Mentions East Africa or Kenya specifically
